source_path: skills/.curated plus local/system skills available in the packaging environment
selection_policy: Install every reusable skill available to this package runtime that can be bundled without network access. OpenAI curated skills keep their upstream LICENSE.txt files; local and system skills are vendored under the local source group. Package install/update refreshes existing bundled skill directories when their content differs, after first moving the previous directory into a local backup folder.

skills.name: security-best-practices
skills.reason: Provides language and framework security review references for changes touching hooks, MCP, installers, and memory writes.

skills.name: security-threat-model
skills.reason: Adds a structured threat-model workflow for reviewing plugin install surfaces, local storage, and tool execution boundaries.

skills.name: cli-creator
skills.reason: Matches this package's Codex-facing CLI and wrapper design work.

skills.name: migrate-to-codex
skills.reason: Helps users migrate agent configuration, hooks, skills, and MCP setup into Codex-oriented layouts.

skills.name: gh-fix-ci
skills.reason: Supports GitHub CI failure inspection and remediation for repository maintenance workflows.

skills.name: gh-address-comments
skills.reason: Supports GitHub PR review comment collection and response workflows.

skills.name: harness-release-gate
skills.reason: Makes this package's verify, xhigh review, and commit gate available in fresh installs without relying on local-only AGENTS.md edits.

skills.name: design-an-interface
skills.reason: Designs module, API, schema, CLI, and contract interfaces before implementation.

skills.name: edit-article
skills.reason: Improves article and handbook structure when documentation prose is the primary deliverable.

skills.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
skills.reason: Provides reusable guardrails for rejecting destructive git commands in automation.

skills.name: git-safe-commit
skills.reason: Stages and commits only task-related files while filtering runtime artifacts and sensitive material.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.reason: Stress-tests unclear product, planning, and design requirements before implementation.

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.reason: Finds architecture improvements that deepen modules and improve testability.

skills.name: migrate-to-shoehorn
skills.reason: Migrates TypeScript tests from broad type assertions to shoehorn-based partial test data.

skills.name: obsidian-vault
skills.reason: Searches and updates Obsidian vault notes with wikilinks and indexes.

skills.name: prd-to-issues
skills.reason: Converts a PRD into issue-sized implementation slices.

skills.name: prd-to-plan
skills.reason: Turns a PRD into phased tracer-bullet implementation plans.

skills.name: proxy-image-generation
skills.reason: Configures Responses API image generation proxies and local save scripts.

skills.name: request-refactor-plan
skills.reason: Creates a small-commit refactor RFC before large module boundary changes.

skills.name: review-fix-merge-branch
skills.reason: Runs a branch-quality loop of self-check, review, fix, commit, and safe merge.

skills.name: scaffold-exercises
skills.reason: Creates course exercise directories, problems, solutions, and explainers.

skills.name: setup-pre-commit
skills.reason: Sets up Husky pre-commit hooks with formatting, type checking, and tests.

skills.name: tdd
skills.reason: Supports red-green-refactor development for risky features and bug fixes.

skills.name: triage-issue
skills.reason: Performs read-only root-cause triage for bugs and issue reports.

skills.name: ubiquitous-language
skills.reason: Extracts DDD-style terminology and flags ambiguous domain language.

skills.name: write-a-prd
skills.reason: Creates product requirement documents from ideas or business goals.

skills.name: write-a-skill
skills.reason: Creates new Codex skills with progressive disclosure and bundled resources.

skills.name: imagegen
skills.reason: Generates or edits bitmap visual assets when image generation is required.

skills.name: openai-docs
skills.reason: Uses official OpenAI documentation for OpenAI product and API questions.

skills.name: plugin-creator
skills.reason: Scaffolds Codex plugin directories and marketplace metadata.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.reason: Guides creation and update of effective Codex skills.

skills.name: skill-installer
skills.reason: Lists and installs skills from curated or GitHub sources when explicitly requested.
